heading: Functional Managers for the intelligence community
label: 3034a Functional Managers for the intelligence community

children.heading: Functional Managers authorized
children.label: a Functional Managers authorized
children.text: The Director of National Intelligence may establish within the intelligence community one or more positions of manager of an intelligence function. Any position so established may be known as the “Functional Manager” of the intelligence function concerned.

children.heading: Personnel
children.label: b Personnel
children.text: The Director shall designate individuals to serve as manager of intelligence functions established under subsection (a) from among officers and employees of elements of the intelligence community.
To act as principal advisor to the Director on the intelligence function.
To carry out such other responsibilities with respect to the intelligence function as the Director may specify for purposes of this section.
